LSE-MS7-L4-1400P-MSMATH7-BNB-EUR-01 | MS Math: Grade 7 | Multi-Step Equations and Inequalities | Breaking News Broadcast | European Historical & Contemporary Contexts
The Castle Broadcast
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why do the reporters need to figure out how many more tickets can still be sold?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART
SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete academic justification. State your claim about why the reporters need an exact number, support that claim with reasoning drawn directly from what the boy says, and articulate the conclusion that follows about what they are about to do on air.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.B.5 | CCSS 7.EE.B.4 | MS Math Grade 7: Multi-Step Equations and Inequalities
